metadata.description: Sync your Claude Code and Codex setup across devices — device-aware, path-tokenized, secret-scanning hub for agent config.

plugins.name: agent-handoff
plugins.description: Slash-command wrapper around the agent-handoff CLI — /agent-handoff:init, /agent-handoff:push, /agent-handoff:pull, /agent-handoff:diff, /agent-handoff:status, /agent-handoff:doctor, /agent-handoff:bootstrap, /agent-handoff:deps.
